description: Configure an automated event rule in Nx Witness VMS to create a bookmark on the 'Parking Lot Camera' when an external AI analytics system detects loitering. The rule must be a 'Generic Event' triggered when the source contains 'AI_Analytics' and the caption contains 'Loitering_Detected'. Verify the configuration by simulating the event via the '/api/createEvent' API endpoint and confirming the bookmark appears on the camera's timeline. Access the Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001 using credentials admin / Admin1234!.
